title: trisetum macrotrichum
intro: Trisetum macrotrichum, also known as tussock grass, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Trisetum macrotrichum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and aid in the treatment of respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Trisetum macrotrichum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
